items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
Khaki with Black
FENDI Kan U Double F Old Flower
FENDI launches the new fashion statement Kan U bag, cleverly balancing functionality and modernity. The entire bag features a relief design, with a visual and tactile feel that is super nice. The classic FF Logo buckle is paired with exquisite retro metal details. Can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody, looking retro and steady.
Size 25x17x10
Style No.: 232

Monogram
Sunshine Mini Tote
Brown FF fabric mini bag model: 8BS051 Coffee fabric More details
Sunshine Brown FF jacquard fabric mini tote, with hard organic glass tortoiseshell effect handle. Equipped with a lined interior pocket, accented with matching leather trim and gold metal hardware. Features two handles and an adjustable detachable thin shoulder strap, for both hand-carry and shoulder wear.
Made in Italy

Monogram Silver buckle Gold buckle

items.name_cn:
Large
Monogram Latest Trend Origami Magic Bag
Classic monogram paired with dark brown calfskin, full of a premium feel. Eight hidden magnetic closures allow the handbag to cleverly transform into a tote bag or fold into an Origami (origami) style bucket bag. A bag for two ways to carry is amazing! Transformable tote, transformable bucket~ There are three sizes to meet our different needs for bag capacity. The more you look, the more you like it.
Large model: 0894. 32.5cmx32.5cmx27.5cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
Monogram
Latest Monogram Boston 365 Boston bag is here!
In this season's collaboration with Milan designer Stefano Pilati, my favorite bag is this one. Fully enclosed magnetic opening, practical and private, suitable for daily commuting, travel, sports, and all occasions.
I have to say this bag is really spacious, with super strong practicality!
Model: Pillow bag Monogram

items.name_en: Sunshine Small Tote, fabric material, decorated with FF pattern jacquard, Sandstone FEND1 ROMA leather lettering. Sandstone organic glass hard handle. Features a spacious lined interior pocket, sandstone leather trim and gold metal hardware. Equipped with two handles and a detachable shoulder strap, for hand-carry or shoulder wear. Model 8042 Dimensions 16.5*5*17cm

items.name_cn:
Baguette Handbag
Color leather handbag
More details
Iconic Baguette Mini handbag, Nappa soft leather material, featuring 3D textured FF pattern. Adorned with FF buckle. Features front flap, magnetic closure, lined interior compartment, pocket, and gold metal hardware. Handbag comes with removable handle and chain shoulder strap, for hand-carry, shoulder carry, or crossbody
Material:Outer: Sheepskin, Lining: Cotton
Depth:4
Length:19
Height:11.5
Model:0191S

items.name_en: New small size Praphy shoulder bag, featuring a crescent shape, with the classic large metal logo [FEND1] decorated at the bottom. The bag's silhouette follows the body's lines perfectly, exuding a full sense of fashion when carried on the shoulder.
